ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "egg_laying" INTEGER /* Whether the species lays eggs */,
  "scales" INTEGER /* Whether the species has scales */,
  "poisonous" INTEGER /* Whether the species is poisonous */,
  "cold_blooded" INTEGER /* Whether the species is cold-blooded */,
  "number_of_legs" INTEGER /* Number of legs the species has */,
  "is_reptile" INTEGER /* Whether the species is a reptile */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus to which the species belongs */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the species belongs */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order to which the species belongs */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class to which the species belongs */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom to which the species belongs */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Natural habitat of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the species */,
  "average_length" REAL /* Average length of the species */,
  "geographic_distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution of the species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the classification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the classification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the classification */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification the trait belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trait */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the trait */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the trait */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the trait was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the trait */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the trait was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traits_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traits_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traits_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trait_occurrences" (
  "occurrence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occurrence */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the trait occurs in */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trait */,
  "presence" INTEGER /* Whether the trait is present in the species */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or observations related to the occurrence */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who recorded the trait occurrence */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the trait occurrence was recorded */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the trait occurrence */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the trait occurrence was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occurrence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_occurrences_trait_id FOREIGN KEY ("trait_id") REFERENCES traits ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_occurrences_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_occurrences_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_occurrences_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the researcher account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the researcher's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the researcher (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the species */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the species was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification being changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, removal, update) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or observations related to the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_history_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trait_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being recommended */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended trait */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used to generate the recommendation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the recommendation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was generated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the recommendation */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_recommendations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_recommendations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_recommendations_trait_id FOREIGN KEY ("trait_id") REFERENCES traits ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_recommendations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
